
# TypeScript wrapper for Wasm modules generated by Emscripten

Although [types](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@types/emscripten) do exist for the default Emscripten JS glue code wrapper,
the JS code itself of that wrapper is a hot mess in the tradition of the most horrible JS coding practices.
So this is an improved, and of course opinionated, version of it in TypeScript.
Most of this wrapper code is taken almost directly from the output of Emscripten, and rewritten or simply rearranged in a more ordered manner.
